title: Exit Liquidity Ep 37 - MEGAHYPE'd w/ Nest
summary_title: Nest's metadex model: solving the DEX trilemma while bootstrapping Hyperliquid's long-tail assets
summary_description: How metadexes balance traders, LPs, and token holders—and why Nest is positioning itself as the home for new Hyper-EVM protocols before graduating to HyperCore.

key_moments.label: What is a metadex and why it solves the DEX trilemma
How token holders vote weekly on fee-generating pools to direct LP rewards
Metadex vs. Uniswap: token value capture and fee distribution differences
Nest as complementary to HyperCore: bootstrapping liquidity for long-tail and new tokens
Introducing the Hype Engine and Megahype: 40% of Nest revenues buying back HYPE
Megahype as a DAT-like token: treasury representation and voting APR distribution
Why Ace is bullish on building on Hyperliquid: organic community, no VC incentives
How to get involved: provide liquidity, lock Nest, vote, earn Megahype via vault

pull_quote: It's the first time since Ethereum that it feels like there's an organic open builder community not being paid by venture capitalists to come build.
